required_preferences.fact: Now incorporates prescription sleep therapy (CPAP use) nightly and is open to medical interventions for sleep and related health — no longer insists on alternative methods only

supersedes.fact: Uses acupuncture as her sole approach for tension headaches — refuses prescription medications unless absolutely necessary

required_preferences.fact: No longer jogs at all due to podiatrist orders — has paused all running and high-impact exercise indefinitely

supersedes.fact: Jogging only happens on weekday evenings, never on weekends due to family commitments

required_preferences.fact: Reviews analytics dashboards daily and shares highlights in Slack — never waits for monthly summaries
Uses a shared digital checklist app to track her parents’ errands, medical appointments, and moving tasks — updates it daily for coordination
Takes prescribed iron supplements immediately after breakfast every morning — never skips a dose and always uses a daily medication tracker
Engages the twins in low-prep Friday night activities at home (board games, pizza nights) whenever her husband is away — avoids elaborate outings or babysitters

persona: A mid-career e-commerce manager at a multinational retail company
